PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF HO, HING FUNG HUANG, HUI CHAN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, ROSA E.L IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLTFS RECOVER FROM DEFT, ROSA GONZALEZ NOTHING BY WAY OF PLTFS COMPLT. WITH THE REQUIREMENT THAT DEFT PAY $786.86 5/26/95 ON OR BEFORE 5PM. IF NOT THE LANDLORD IS ENTITLED TO POSS. OF THE PREM, FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE & DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $786.86.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, ROSA E.L GONZALEZ, JUAN CARLOS BY WAY OF PLTF'S COMPLT, PROVIDED ROSA GONZALEZ PAYS $786.86 BY 5PM 5-26-95. IF NOT, JDMT IS FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFTS FOR REST & POSS OF PREMISES AT 355 HARKNESS, FORFEITURE OF LEASE & $786.86 BACK RENT & DAMAGES.
